name: Confusion
description: Sows madness among enemies. Creatures of two hit dice or fewer succumb at once; stronger creatures resist for a delay of one twelve-sided die roll less the caster's level in turns (zero or negative: immediate). Creatures of four or more hit dice save against magic each turn — success that turn spares them, failure confuses them. The spell reaches 2d6 creatures, +1 per caster level above 8th. Each turn the confused roll 2d6: on 2-5 they attack the caster's party, on 6-8 they mill about, on 9-12 they fall on each other. Duration: 12 turns. Range: 12".
period_conventions: delay formula: 1d12 − caster level, in turns
